title: Cops get another hug from Hirunika
body_lines: The 5th lane in Flower Road was blocked by protestors today where Ranil’s private residence is situated in Colombo. A group of protestors headed by Hirunika Premachandra have stormed the place which has resulted in a huge traffic near the Thurston College road. The protestors were trying to break in through the barricades. Pictures show Hirunika Premachandra is hugging a police officer, which has become her recent stunt. Pix by Pradeep Dilrukshana
